findings.description: Java action implementation examples are omitted from both s1 (common attributes usage example) and s4 (codeタグ usage example). The source includes Java code blocks labeled `// アクションの実装例` in each section, showing `batch.setStatus("03")` and `context.setRequestScopedVar("batch", batch)`. These demonstrate the complete usage flow (action → JSP tag → HTML output) and provide context for understanding how the JSP tags obtain their values via request scope.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains two occurrences of the Java action example: once before the codeSelect JSP example in the common attributes section, and once before the codeタグ JSP examples in the codeタグ section.
